changes.description: Derived the first v0.1.0 public-candidate draft from the internally approved v0.0.2 development release artifacts.
Recorded Serkan acceptance of HGNC, MONDO, Open Targets Platform, and ClinVar source-use pre-checks with watch items.
Generated source and source-snapshot freshness metadata for the public-candidate release renderer and export gate.

v0.2.0 de-doubles the ClinVar gene-condition source_record_id (ClinVarGeneCondition:...:MONDO:<id>, previously ...:MONDO:MONDO:<id>). The corrected SourceName-handling helper landed in commit 2c0081d; the re-normalized ClinVar records form a new immutable snapshot snapshot:clinvar:gene-condition:alzheimer-mondo-0004975:2026-06-07-srid2 (the same 2026-06-07 fetch in corrected format), so the published ...:2026-06-07 snapshot stays immutable. Relative to v0.1.1, ClinVar evidence-row ids are rotated and the ClinVar snapshot id changes; genes, diseases, Open Targets evidence, scores, and association membership are unchanged. v0.1.0/v0.1.1 and their public-data-repo tags retain the doubled-namespace format and are not re-tagged.
